title: Optimizing React Memoized Component Re-renders Due to Changing Object Properties

statement.markdown: You are given a React functional component `MemoizedComponent` that uses the `useMemo` hook to memoize a value based on the `props`. However, the `useMemo` hook is not properly handling changes to the `props` object, resulting in unnecessary re-renders. Fix the implementation to only re-render the component when the `props` change in a way that affects the memoized value.
statement.inputFormat: The `MemoizedComponent` props will be passed as an object with various key-value pairs. The props object will be a JSON string.
statement.outputFormat: The memoized value will be returned as a string.
statement.notes: The `useMemo` hook should only re-render the component when the `props` change in a way that affects the memoized value.

constraints.description: The number of key-value pairs in the props object

examples.explanation: The memoized value is 1 when the props are {"a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3} and changes to 3 when the props are {"a": 1, "b": 3, "c": 3}

hints.text: Use the `JSON.stringify` method to compare the props objects

editorial.title: Optimizing React Memoized Component Re-renders Due to Changing Object Properties
editorial.intuition: The `useMemo` hook should only re-render the component when the `props` change in a way that affects the memoized value.
editorial.bruteForce: Current implementation uses `JSON.stringify` to compare the props objects, but this is not sufficient to handle changes to the props object.
editorial.betterSolution: Use a custom comparison function to compare the props objects.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the `JSON.stringify` method to compare the props objects and add a check to ignore changes to the props object when the memoized value is not affected.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The corrected implementation only re-renders the component when the props change in a way that affects the memoized value.
commonMistakes: Not using a custom comparison function
Not ignoring changes to the props object when the memoized value is not affected
